segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: How was the plane able to clear the mountains?

translation.text: 飞机是怎样越过群山的？

segments.text: In 1929, three years after his flight over the North Pole, the American explorer R.

translation.text: 1929年，在飞越北极三年后，美国探险家R·

segments.text: Byrd successfully flew over the South Pole for the first time.

translation.text: 伯德首次成功飞越南极。

segments.text: Though at first, Byrd and his men were able to take a great many photographs of the mountains that lay below, they soon ran into serious trouble.

translation.text: 起初，伯德和队员们还能拍摄下面群山的大量照片，但很快便陷入了严重困境。

segments.text: At one point, it seemed certain that their plane would crash.

translation.text: 一度看来，他们的飞机肯定会坠毁。

segments.text: It could only get over the mountains if it rose to 10,000 feet.

translation.text: 飞机只有升到一万英尺才能越过群山。

segments.text: Byrd at once ordered his men to throw out two heavy food sacks.

translation.text: 伯德立即命令队员扔掉两袋沉重的食物。

segments.text: The plane was then able to rise and it cleared the mountains by 400 feet.

translation.text: 随后飞机得以升高，以400英尺的余量越过了群山。

segments.text: Byrd now knew that he would be able to reach the South Pole which was 300 miles away, for there were no more mountains in sight.

translation.text: 伯德这时知道，他能够到达300英里外的南极了，因为视野中再也没有山峰。

segments.text: The aircraft was able to fly over the endless white plains without difficulty.

translation.text: 飞机得以毫无困难地飞越无边无际的白色平原。
